findings.title: Executes shell commands
findings.detail: Executes shell commands in bin/cli.mjs. Confirm this is disclosed by the server's tool descriptions.

findings.title: Dynamic code evaluation (eval/Function)
findings.detail: Dynamic code evaluation (eval/Function) in bin/cli.mjs. Confirm this is disclosed by the server's tool descriptions.

findings.title: Large encoded blob in source
findings.detail: bin/cli.mjs contains a long base64-like literal, sometimes used to hide payloads.

findings.title: Decoded data flows into code execution
findings.detail: bin/cli.mjs decodes base64 and appears to execute it — a classic obfuscated-payload pattern.
